schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Cron expression, preset (@daily, @hourly, etc.), timedelta, or null to disable scheduling

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: List of tags for filtering DAGs in the Airflow UI

catchup.title: Catchup
catchup.description: Whether to backfill missed DAG runs between start_date and now

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: Earliest logical date for the DAG (ISO 8601 date or datetime)

default_args.title: Default Args
default_args.description: Default arguments applied to all tasks in the DAG (e.g. owner, retries, retry_delay)

max_active_runs.title: Max Active Runs
max_active_runs.description: Maximum number of active DAG runs allowed at once

max_active_tasks.title: Max Active Tasks
max_active_tasks.description: Maximum number of tasks that can run simultaneously across all active runs

owner.title: Owner
owner.description: Owner of the DAG, used in default_args if not overridden

is_paused_upon_creation.title: Is Paused Upon Creation
is_paused_upon_creation.description: Whether the DAG should be paused when first created

doc_md.title: Doc Md
doc_md.description: Markdown documentation displayed in the Airflow UI
